content: Lowkey none of them really got much synergy going for them, but you could use Thais for GMurphy if you got the Pulls to try and obtain her at E0 minimum from her Banner before it leaves and (optionally) her Sig Wheel too then dabble into the Aequor Standard Banner for Goliath + Caecus (or Faros), could alternatively do Sanga but you'll fall short of Sustain / Death Resistance (or Immune)

omfg no
ugh is there no lumerian tanks >:(?
Cheri u blow my mind
faros
how is she a tank?
her exalt gives shield, and you build her tank
its the one exalt you wanna be casting every turn alongside miryam for the lemurian shield
feast from afar + shield boosting wheels
About 60 i got
I just got ryker is he any good
decent for most comps, very good for a few
i dont think faros is really a tank tbh
she has shield on exalt but its not very consistent
she has no tank synergy in her kit and the exalt shield is like nothing
idk why you call her a tank
its super consistent
350 shield from lemurian + 150 shield from her exalt
and its the only lemurian which doesnt mind to pop her exalt at any time
beside miryam
but charging miryam is harder
if you are limiting yourself to lemurians then faros is the least bad tank
but shes so crap compared to all the actual tanks in the game
thats an opinion
like ogier does more with his exalt
ogier doesnt do 350 + 150 shield on exalt
where is the 350 shield coming from again
the lemurian buff
the first lemurian exalt gives 350 shield
whose talent is it
oh, gmurphy
so gmurphy is the tank lol
(?) she is not exalting near as often as faros
The tentacles are your tank <:Cheerup:1400771555939844149>
ok sure whatever enjoy your tank faros
try to enjoy your tankless gmurphy (?)

Realistically fights shouldn't be going past turn 3
Turn 2 ideally
Meaning u only need one strong exalt spammer, and white stance fixes the rest.
Bosses are obviously different but in boss fights ur spamming Myriam exalt with her Rouse anyways

for blue team

Hello, I'm new to the game and would like some general advice/tips when progressing through the game. I've been getting through pretty fast by stacking counters, but I'm not sure if I can rely on it forever. Thank you.
Sanga
Try to get a copy of Fauxborn before the banner ends in 1(?) day
And her Sig WoD
Ran out of luminous cores💔
Better?
stacking counters is strong early game, mediocre in mid game, and requires high investment endgame
issue is that enemy damage goes up faster than your shield goes up
so it becomes a very risky strategy that is only good in niche situations
like against specific bosses etc
once you finish chapter 1 you unlock aigis who is one of the best caro supports in the game
you can use her over faint
faint is normally used for revives
which you probably dont need as a new player
Very informative, thank you!
Try to get gmurphy wheel as well. +2 hand size is one of the rarest buffs in game. It's overall a very strong wheel on her.

Hello! I am new to the game (but I’m currently at chapter 4 ep 5 and I kept on dying). Damage is ok but it’s hard to sustain teams while fighting elite bosses, can someone recommend me characters to pull/change characters in my deck? thank you

try putting aigis on your team over celeste

Caro gives crimson furnace which is a heal on demand
you can also replace faros or whoever
also, if you didn't know, you can opt not to play gmurphy's abyss hymn and it will cleanse your sacrifice
so you kill yourself less in long fights
also do you know how to switch tentacle stances
Yes I do know how to switch tentacle stances, but idk how people get like over 100+ shields so i kept on dying
the shield amount is based on your max hp
So it’s purely based on levels?
it's partly your levels, partly your character stats
however
you can run the R wheel Gluttony
and get 40% max hp
Gluttony, Frenzy and Emerge are better than pretty much all sr wheels
you can put them on your supports
and the passives are incredibly powerful
Ooh okay okay, thank you for the tips! do you have any recommendations to who I should change Faros with? I don’t mind spending another pulls. Should I save for Miryam, or whoever else?
thais is one of the best characters in the game and worth pulling
more copies of Gmurphy dramatically improves her dps capabilities
thais wheel is also really good
and you should get one copy at least
you can run thais and gmurphy in the same team, it's strong
miryam id say is medium priority, she is not as good as getting more of gmurphy or 1 copy of thais and her wheel
she's a good pickup after you already got those
as she is used in endgame comp with gmurphy
I see, so priorities are thais > her wheel > gmurphy copy > miryam? I’ll try your recommended team out, thank you for the help^^!
For arc 1 story the team i recommend is gmurphy, thais, aigis, (flex slot)
in the flex spot you can put tulu or celeste or whoever you want
gmurphy thais and aigis are just really strong
At e3 gmurphy can basically carry you for the entire game
so that is a good stopping point
at minimum i would want e2 on a main dps gmurphy
I just got thais and will be getting her wheel thingy, I suppose tulu, gmurph, thais and aigis (all at e0) is enough to sustain the whole chapter 4? i want tulu on my team because hes cool
yes, to survive you basically rotate crimson furnace, white tentacle stance, and aigis stun
thais can also inflict weakness
and thais can generate copies of gmurphy's waltz or her own weakness card
she is broken op
I see i see, I will try that out. Thank you!!
Try get gmurphy e2-3
If you can
Makes her upset potential
Dps
upset

a team i recommend to newbies starting this patch is gmurphy thais aigis (flex)

while caecus is a bum
i recommend trying to get 1-2 more copies of gmurphy before her banner ends
e3 gmurphy is top tier dps that will carry you for the whole game
Who should I get from the gift box?
also it doesnt have to be caecus or goliath specifically, those are just the best options you own

it kinda depends per character but a good general guide is keyflare and crit for your main dps

What's a good build for tank Salvador e0 lvl 60? I'm thinking feast and unyielding

I'm trying to learn more about team-building alongside trying to figure out what teams are actually available to me now that I am nearing the end of the first arc. So far I've managed to stomp my way through the game on account of tentacles, Cost-Co/Cursed Relics and G.Murphy paving the way, but I'd figure I'd ask for some advice on how to build something correctly going going forward.
I already looked up a few guides and the like, but so far I think my best bet for finishing arc 1 and its hardmode and going into early arc 2 is probably still building around G.Murphy/Tentacles, or is there anything else that I am missing? My Covenant collection is still pretty shit IMO, I got a single copy for a bunch of wheels with G.Murphys being at 4 dupes with Titan's Blade being on +7 right now, the rest is a bunch of random shit I got from pulling during my early stay in "wheel jail", also got 1 copy of Tawil, Clementine and G-Dolls wheels. 
From what I've gathered slotting in Aigis for her unique Petrify gimmick instead of a full Blue team should allow for pretty good flexibility/cheesing some difficult mechanics.
Currently sitting on 20k silver as I got decently lucky so I could pull some dupes on current banners though the collab banner is tempting me.
Also: Praised be G-Murphy and her ungodly amount of card-draw, I don't know how I'd ever play without the comfort of drawing 4/generating 4 mana every turn.

your strongest team is for sure gmurphy

biggest problem is that you have a bunch of good limited characters but no dupes on them, kath and gdoll are like barely usable at e0
corposant is relegated to 4th slot shielder at e0
if u are low investment u need to focus on specific characters and try to get them to a good number of enlightens to get their full kit
as it is i cant recommend any team for you other than gmurphy lemurians
I got some cash I'll be throwing at the game, just trying to figure out the best bundles
I think I'm at 80~90 hours played? The devs have earned it
its a good game <:pray:1356053116260454534>
Probably the anni bundle with 200 pulls
Yeah for sure
So for your 200 pulls
i suggest getting thais e2
1 copy of thais wheel and gmurphy wheel if you dont have them already
and then pull for mouchette and miryam next banner
well dont pull for mouchette right away i guess, see what the experienced players say
but you are at the stage where you need to go deeper rather than wider
I'd imagine a collab unit will be at the very least decent
you will have 1 free mouchette
Plus her gimmick and everything around it seems interesting what with being strike focused
Well I got Thais to E2 and a copy of her wheel in 60 pulls so I'd say that's lucky as fuck
Hand Size wheel for caro is sure to be useful

so after patch you will have a full gmurphy team with miryam, tulu, goliath

a thais pickman team with the dps of your choice (probably mouchette)

a castor + jenkin + clementine + erica team

something like karen ogier doll (whale kath) for your 4th dtide team

and then you can scrape together some lotan gdoll comp for the last team
you have kath, corposant, pollux, doresain, pickman, gelot, tawil but all are barely usable because no enlightens
Yeah I just blindly grabbed single copies when the rotating banners were up and got pretty lucky
Btw I greatly appreciate the help!

but like
just run paradox

Hello I start the game and I rerolled for G-murphy
Now I have her, should I try for Thais? I heard she is one of the best support in the game. Is she good with g-murphy?
Thank you 🙂
get a copy of gmurphy's wheel. if you don't want to go for more copies of gmurphy, you can go for thais. she's good for gmurphy in arc 1 (better if thais is e2)
thais is good with literally every character in the game
Yes. Get Thais wheel first

is this a good team for doing chapter 7 hard or should i try a different combination? (i don't have uvhash's WoD yet :( but soon hopefully)
those birds look pretty big. I would drop uvhash for a support like aigis. Don't think you want to run a second dps with pollux.
is aigis a good support if i only have her at e0?
Yes. The two main things she provides is lots of vuln and her stun on exalt.
Started the game recently, I am using these guys here
Unfortunately, couldn't get more copies of Castor
aigis enlightens are really nice because they help her build embryo fusion (and later dupes she also gets nice stats), but she works out of the box at e0.
Aigis petrify is so nice when the bosses want to try to ohk you
Hello! Just started the game yesterday. What should my main team be?
Murphy, Faros, Aigis and Caecus, maybe? 🤔
That way, you get Caro and Aqueor mechanics
Caecus at 3+ is good for healing, I'm still trying to get my third copy of him
Thanks!
Caecus at 3+ helps healing, Aigis being a Caro also heals
Faros is good to bring cards to the hand
She also poisons
Gives shield too
Tulu is good too
I don't have her but she rocks whenever I borrow
is thais not a good enough support for this team? I want to clear chapter 7 hard quicker, so that's why I was taking uvhash as a second dps

thais is an extremely good support. Possibly the best. Its pretty common to pair her with aigis as a duo. I think you will probably clear faster with aigis providing consistant vuln on enemies and her stun allowing you to play more aggressively with pollux than using e2 uvhash as a second dps, but you could try out both variations and see what works better for you.
thank you for the explanation! yeah, I think I'll try both team comps out and see how it goes
